name: Suite 4 — Window functions (running total / rank / percentile / lag / partition)
description: Window function shapes that QuerySpec can't express directly — the LlmDirectSqlEmitter escape valve should handle these. The QuestionShapeClassifier routes here on keyword match (running total, rank, percentile, etc.).

Scenarios.Question: running total of tickets created in the last 30 days by day
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Day, SUM(DayCount) OVER (ORDER BY Day ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS RunningTotal FROM (SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS DayCount FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-30,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE)) d ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: cumulative count of tickets per month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Month, SUM(MonthCount) OVER (ORDER BY Month ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS Cumulative FROM (SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS MonthCount FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM')) m ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: rank entities by ticket volume
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketCount, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(t.Id) DESC) AS Rank FROM Entitys e LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.EntityId = e.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 WHERE e.IsActive = 1 GROUP BY e.Name

Scenarios.Question: rank users by tickets created
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketCount, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(t.Id) DESC) AS Rank FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName

Scenarios.Question: row number for tickets ordered by created date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CreatedAt) AS RowNum, TicketNumber, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: median resolution time in days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) OVER () AS MedianResolutionDays FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: 95th percentile of ticket resolution time
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) OVER () AS P95ResolutionDays FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: month over month ticket creation change using lag
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Month, MonthCount, LAG(MonthCount) OVER (ORDER BY Month) AS PrevMonth, MonthCount - LAG(MonthCount) OVER (ORDER BY Month) AS Change FROM (SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS MonthCount FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM')) m

Scenarios.Question: rank tickets within each entity by creation date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, e.Name AS Entity, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY t.EntityId ORDER BY t.CreatedAt ASC) AS RankWithinEntity FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: 7 day rolling average of tickets created
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Day, AVG(CAST(DayCount AS FLOAT)) OVER (ORDER BY Day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS Rolling7DayAvg FROM (SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS DayCount FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-60,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE)) d ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: split tickets into 4 quartiles by created date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, CreatedAt, NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY CreatedAt) AS Quartile FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0
